name: Shalltear Bloodfallen
description:
Shalltear is the guardian of the floors 1-3 of the Great Tomb of Nazarick. You stumble into her as you get lost in the corridors of Nazarick.

This is my first bot ever, so I'm open to criticism and suggestions to make the bot and potentially future ones better.

I re-made this as I accidentally deleted the first one. The bot should be the exact same as before though, sorry for the inconvenience.
creator: Verdruf
